data.title: AKVA group ASA: Annual Report 2025
data.description: The Annual Report for 2025 has been released by AKVA Group ASA, which includes the ESG report and corporate governance report. This publication marks a pivotal moment for the company as it discloses crucial information regarding its performance and sustainability efforts. Investors and stakeholders can now access detailed insights into the financial highlights, operational strategies, and future outlook of AKVA Group ASA. Additionally, the report outlines key ESG metrics and the company's commitment to responsible business practices. The corporate governance report sheds light on the organization's structure, leadership, and transparency measures. This comprehensive disclosure demonstrates AKVA Group ASA's dedication to accountability and transparency in its operations.

data.title: Robo.ai Subsidiary Robus Commences Deliveries of Its Prototype Vehicles in the Pakistani Market
data.description: On April 10, 2026, in Dubai, UAE, Robo.ai Inc. (NASDAQ: AIIO) shared that its subsidiary, Robus, has finished producing its first commercial prototype vehicles. The company has started delivering these vehicles in Pakistan. This milestone marks a significant step in the company's expansion into the Pakistani market.

data.title: Hagar hf.: Information on the publication of Management‘s report for 2025/26 and Q4 results
data.description: Hagar hf. is set to release the management's report for the 2025/26 financial year and Q4 results, which pertain to the period from December 1 to February 28, after the market closes on Thursday, April 16, 2026. The audited annual financial statements for the 2025/26 fiscal year will then be made public on April 29, 2026.

data.title: 13 Top Press Releases from March
data.description: Announcing the launch of new items at Build-A-Bear and Kinder Joy, along with the introduction of a Relax Row on United Airlines' international flights. Additionally, a review of the most talked-about subjects in March, featuring Women's History Month and updates on MWC 2026. This information was shared from New York on April 10, 2026, through a PRNewswire report, covering a broad spectrum of trending topics from various sectors.

data.title: American Strategic Investment Co. Announces Updated Release Date for Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: American Strategic Investment Co. (NYSE: NYC) issued a statement today indicating their upcoming financial results release for the fourth quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2025. This data will be disclosed on Wednesday, April 15, 2026, ahead of the New York Stock Exchange opening. A webcast and conference call are scheduled for that day at 11:00 a.m. ET, during which the company will discuss the results and offer insights on its business performance. Participants can access the conference call through provided dial-in instructions.
